case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. TAMMY MATTHEWS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,055.07 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, TAMMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF'S REPRESENTATIVE JOSEPH QUARTELL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, TAMMY $1,055.07 PRINCIPAL, $70.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,125.57, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
